title: sida elliottii var. elliottii
intro: Sida elliottii var. elliottii, also known as white heart, is a plant species native to the southeastern United States, belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Sida elliottii var. elliottii has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
